rationale: Both reviews surface the same grounded api-design defects in the three main public decls (tautological curvature thm, vacuous IsCompactOrientedManifold with : True, duplicate UBP alias), all directly verifiable from the diff; acting on either produces the same outcome of removing/fixing them. The only differences (whole-file scope claim naming specific EffectiveBounds targets; Review 1's private-helper suggestion) are unconfirmable from the diff and not material enough to change the resulting PR quality.
